title: Pushing My AI Dark Factory to Its Limits with Opus + Kimi Combined
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates a multi-model agentic workflow combining Anthropic Claude Opus for deep reasoning and planning with Kimi K2.6 for implementation and validation. The approach optimizes token efficiency by routing reasoning-heavy tasks to a stronger model while using a faster model for execution, enabling the AI Dark Factory self-building codebase to scale beyond single-model limitations.
